data.title: Babylon total value locked drops 32% as wallets unstake $1.2B in Bitcoin
data.description:
Bitcoin staking protocol Babylon saw $1. 26 billion in BTC unstaked from its platform, plunging the protocol’s total value locked by 32%.  On April 17, blockchain analytics firm Lookonchain flagged several addresses that had unstaked 14,929 Bitcoin (BTC) from the staking platform. The security firm flagged four addresses that unstaked 299 BTC, 499 BTC, 1,000 BTC and 13,129 BTC
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/babylon-unstaking-1-billion-tvl-drops-30-percent?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: JPMorgan says bitcoin has failed to benefit from safe-haven flows backing gold
data.description:
JPMorgan says gold is attracting safe-haven demand from ETF and futures investors, while bitcoin is seeing the opposite trend.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/351137/jpmorgan-bitcoin-failed-to-benefit-safe-haven-flows-gold?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Trump Slams Powell Over Rate Cuts: ‘Too Late and Wrong!’ Calls for Fed Chair’s Removal
data.description:
S. President Donald Trump slammed Fed Chair Jerome Powell on Thursday, saying he’s “always too late and wrong” for not cutting interest rates. Trump believes the Fed should have acted way sooner to support the economy
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/trump-slams-powell-too-late-and-wrong-calls-for-fed-chairs-removal-amid-tariff-chaos/

data.title: JPMorgan: Bitcoin Fails to Benefit from Safe-haven Flows Driving Gold Rally
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Analysts at JPMorgan Chase said that safe-haven demand is pushing up gold prices, while Bitcoin has failed to benefit from it. In a report released on Wednesday, a team of JPMorgan analysts led by Managing Director Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou pointed out that investors seeking safe havens are driving funds into gold's trading platform exchange-traded funds (ETFs) and futures markets due to macroeconomic uncertainty. In contrast, Bitcoin has been left aside. Analysts pointed out that speculative interest in the Bitcoin futures market is weakening, and ETFs have also seen continuous outflows of funds. (The Block)

data.title: Bitget has launched U-standard 10,000,000 AIDOGE perpetual contract with leverage range of 1-20 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched the U-standard 10,000,000 AIDOGE perpetual contract with a leverage range of 1-20 times. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: Gate.io 2025 Q1 perpetual contract trading volume market share increased significantly, and the platform currency GT continued to rise
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the latest "Crypto Industry Report for the First Quarter of 2025" released by CoinGecko, in the context of the overall market sentiment tending to be conservative and the total open interest (OI) of perpetual contracts of the top exchanges falling by 32.7% quarterly, Gate.io is one of the few platforms whose open interest remains stable and continues to rise, with the quarterly OI ratio increasing from 7% to 16%, more than doubling.
In addition, the report also pointed out that Gate.io's perpetual contract trading volume has steadily increased, outperforming most platforms, and has leapt in the market share ranking this quarter together with Coinbase International.
The Q1 quarterly report released by Gate.io recently also confirmed its strong performance. The platform has achieved comprehensive growth in contract product experience, asset security and user activity. The report shows that the contract trading volume this quarter increased by about 31% month-on-month, and the number of traders and trading activity increased significantly. In addition, the platform currency GT continued to rise, hitting a record high of US$25.96 in 2025, and an increase of nearly 70% since the beginning of the year.

data.title: Binance Alpha to List GOMBLE (GM)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Binance announced that GOMBLE (GM) will be available for trading on Binance Alpha at 19:30 on April 17, 2025. All Binance exchange users with a purchase history on Alpha will receive an airdrop of 403 GM tokens. Eligible users will receive tokens in their Alpha accounts.
Only users who purchase on Alpha using Binance exchange spot or funding accounts between 08:00:00 on March 27, 2025 and 07:59:59 on April 17, 2025.

data.title: LBank will list BIAO (BIAO)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch BIAO (BIAO) at 19:30 (SGT) on April 17, and open the BIAO/USDT trading pair. The deposit service will be opened at 19:30 on April 17, and the withdrawal service will be opened at 20:00 on April 18.

data.title: Reuters poll: 45% chance of U.S. recession in next year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to a Reuters survey, the US economy will grow by 1.4% in 2025 and 1.5% in 2026 (previous forecasts in March were 2.2% and 2.0%, respectively). The probability of the United States falling into a recession in the next year is 45%, the highest level since December 2023. The inflation expectations of the US Consumer Price Index (CPI) in 2025 have also seen the largest increase since March 2023. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance Alpha Adds DARK
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Alpha has added DARK.
